title: Suggestion: Add "Now" Button for Date & Time Input
excerpt:

posts.author: kimdh (donghwan kim)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

When entering data into a date column, I often need to input the current date and time instantly. While there is already a “Today” button, it would be really convenient to have a “Now” button next to it that immediately fills in both the current date and time.

I know this could be implemented using automation and a button, but I’d prefer to keep the board view clean and uncluttered. I believe adding this feature directly to the input UI would be a more elegant solution.

Thank you!
